channel.title: News on PrestaShop Developers' blog
channel.description: Recent content in News on PrestaShop Developers' blog

item.title: OW2con’26 — two days of open source conversations with PrestaShop
item.description: OW2con’26 has just wrapped up, and PrestaShop was proud to take part in two packed days (June 2–3) at Orange Innovation Gardens in Paris–Châtillon. As OW2’s annual European open source conference, OW2con delivered what it does best: practical discussions, a welcoming community, and high-quality conversations.

item.title: Security update for the Faceted Search module (ps_facetedsearch)
item.description: A security vulnerability has been identified in the Faceted Search module (ps_facetedsearch). Under certain conditions, specially crafted requests could be processed unsafely by the module and lead to the execution of unauthorized code on the server. The issue does not require an account or authentication, so any shop running an affected version is exposed.

item.title: PrestaShop Core Monthly - May 2026
item.description: Welcome to the May 2026 Core Monthly. It was a month with a strong maintenance rhythm, two releases on the 9.1 branch, and a lot of quieter groundwork: a fresh take on how the project shares its conventions with AI tools, a one-page checkout slowly coming together in the open, and the usual steady flow of migrations on the develop branch.

item.title: PS Summit 2026 - Call for Papers now open (Lyon)
item.description: This November, the PrestaShop and Sylius communities will meet in Lyon, France for the first-ever PS Summit powered by PrestaShop & Sylius: a two-day conference designed to bring together the open source ecommerce community and the wider ecosystem.

item.title: PrestaShop 9.1.3 is available
item.description: PrestaShop 9.1.3 is now available. This is a small security maintenance release for the 9.1 branch that brings in the latest patch versions of two key upstream dependencies, Symfony and Twig, following their coordinated security advisories published on 2026-05-20.

item.title: PrestaShop 9.1.2 is available
item.description: PrestaShop 9.1.2 is now available. This is the first regular maintenance release for the 9.1 branch, focused entirely on bug fixes, stability improvements, and dependency updates. After the security-only 9.1.1 release at the end of April, this version consolidates several weeks of community-driven fixes into one update.

item.title: PrestaShop and OSPO Alliance - Turning Community Energy Into Impact
item.description: We recently had the opportunity to be interviewed by the OSPO Alliance to discuss what open source means at PrestaShop - and, more importantly, what we do to keep a long-running project healthy, collaborative, and sustainable. Open source isn’t a side track for us: it’s part of PrestaShop’s DNA, and it influences how we build, ship, and improve the software together with the community.

item.title: Teaching AI to speak PrestaShop
item.description: You ask your AI assistant to add a new Back Office listing page. It dutifully reaches for HelperList, configures a few fields, drops in a legacy admin controller, and produces something that would have looked perfectly correct in PrestaShop 1.7. The code compiles, the page renders, and you ship it. Six months later, you end up rewriting it on top of the Grid component, a GridDefinitionFactory, and a CQRS-aware controller wiring, because that is the architecture the rest of the codebase has been using for years.

item.title: PrestaShop Core Monthly - April 2026
item.description: A busy month in the codebase: a critical security release, fast iteration on bringing AI into the project’s workflows, and a save-the-date for PS Summit in Lyon.

item.title: PrestaShop 8.2.6 is available
item.description: PrestaShop 8.2.6 is available. This security patch for the 8.2 branch addresses a Critical stored Cross-Site Scripting vulnerability. Updating as soon as possible is strongly recommended.

item.title: PrestaShop 9.1.1 is available
item.description: PrestaShop 9.1.1 is available. This security patch for the 9.1 branch addresses a Critical stored Cross-Site Scripting vulnerability. Updating as soon as possible is strongly recommended.

item.title: PrestaShop Core Monthly - March 2026
item.description: March was a milestone month for PrestaShop. The long-awaited 9.1 release shipped with Hummingbird 2.0 as the default theme, the community gathered at the first Ecommerce Open Source Summit, and the March Live Update featured PrestaShop’s new leadership for the first time on the stream.

item.title: PrestaShop Live Update - March 2026
item.description: On March 31st, 2026, we hosted the first PrestaShop Project Live Update of 2026. This was a special edition: Mikołaj Król (CEO), Damian Murawski (COO), and Olivier Binet (General Manager) joined us for the first time together since PrestaShop’s acquisition. The trio said hi, answered community questions, and shared their perspective on the project’s direction. We also covered the latest releases and gave an in-depth look at the upcoming One Page Checkout feature.

item.title: Ecommerce Open Source Summit 2026 - a wrap-up
item.description: The inaugural Ecommerce Open Source Summit (EO2S) wrapped up after a packed day of conferences, technical deep dives, and networking. Held on March 26, 2026 at Le Nida in Issy-les-Moulineaux, the event brought together developers, agencies, and ecommerce professionals united by a shared commitment to open source ecommerce.

item.title: Announcing PrestaShop Project Live Update March 2026
item.description: The first PrestaShop Project Live Update of 2026 will take place on Tuesday, March 31st, 2026 at 3 PM (Paris time) on YouTube!
